digest.en: US President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin discussed Iran war over phone. The conversation came as Iran's oil prices reached historic highs. Iranian Speaker Mohammad Ghalibaf warned of consequences amid escalating tensions.
digest.hi:
लंदन में यहूदियों पर चाकू से हमला हुआ। पुलिस ने इसे आतंकी घटना मान लिया है। ब्रिटेन के प्रधानमंत्री स्टार्मर ने चिंता जताई है। 

अमेरिकी सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने वोटिंग राइट्स एक्ट को कमजोर कर दिया है। पूर्व राष्ट्रपति ओबामा और उपराष्ट्रपति हैरिस ने इसे लोकतंत्र के लिए खतरा बताया है। 

पाकिस्तान ने पहले नक्शे में जम्मू-कश्मीर को भारत से अलग दिखाया था। अब पाकिस्तान ने विवाद पर माफी मांग ली है।

articles.title: $25 Billion, $40 Billion, $50 Billion? How Much Is US Really Spending On Iran War
articles.summary: The US has not added repair costs to the claimed bill for the Iran war, with the Pentagon still assessing the situation. Repair costs have not been added to the claimed bill for this war; this has 'not been reflected' in the $1.5 trillion budget FY27 proposal because the Pentagon is still 'assessing' the situation.

articles.title: North Korea faces 'severe' drought: State media
articles.summary: North Korea is experiencing a severe drought, according to state media. North Korea faces 'severe' drought: State media.

articles.title: Iran Speaker Ghalibaf's Big Warning As Oil Prices Reach Historic High
articles.summary: Iran Speaker Ghalibaf warned against a maritime blockade, saying it would not immediately cripple oil production. Ghalibaf ridiculed the notion that a maritime blockade would immediately cripple Iran's oil production.

articles.title: Putin's "Extremely Damaging Consequences" Warning To Trump In 90-Minute Call
articles.summary: Putin warned of extremely damaging consequences in a 90-minute call with Trump, discussing Iran and the Persian Gulf. The presidents "paid particular attention to the situation regarding Iran and in the Persian Gulf".

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Trump, Putin Speak Over Phone, Discuss Iran War
articles.summary: Trump and Putin discussed the Iran war in a phone call, focusing on the situation in the Persian Gulf. US Israel Iran War Ceasefire News LIVE Updates:. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Trump, Putin Speak Over Phone, Discuss Iran War.

articles.title: China Accelerates Intimidation Tactics against Taiwan
articles.summary: China has increased military activities near Taiwan, including sending fighter jets and bombers. This escalation is part of China's ongoing efforts to intimidate Taiwan, which China claims as its own territory.

articles.title: Iran Touts New Weapon After Trump Rejects Peace Plan
articles.summary: Iran showcased a new weapon after US President Trump rejected a peace plan proposed by Iran. The plan included reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway for global oil shipments.

articles.title: Iranian officials denied entry into Canada for FIFA meeting weeks before World Cup
articles.summary: Canadian authorities denied entry to Iranian football federation officials for a FIFA meeting. The meeting took place weeks before the World Cup, potentially complicating Iran's participation in the tournament. Iranian football federation officials have been denied access into Canada for a FIFA meeting just weeks before the start of the World Cup.

articles.title: Israel seizes Global Sumud Flotilla boats 1,000km away from Gaza
articles.summary: Israeli forces intercepted a dozen aid boats from the Global Sumud Flotilla bound for Gaza. The boats were seized approximately 1,000km away from Gaza, disrupting an effort to deliver aid to the region.

articles.title: Trump says US focused on phone negotiations with Iran rather than in Pakistan
articles.summary: US President Trump stated that the US is focused on phone negotiations with Iran. These talks occur as the US seeks to address Iran's actions, with Trump indicating that discussions are not taking place in Pakistan.

articles.title: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
articles.summary: US singer D4vd is accused of buying tools online to dispose of a girl's body, prosecutors allege. His attorneys maintain his innocence and have vowed to defend him vigorously. The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.

articles.title: Pro-government rally in Tehran demands end to US threats
articles.summary: Hundreds of Iranians rallied in Tehran to demand an end to US threats and the ongoing blockade of Iranian ports. The pro-government rally was held in response to US actions.

articles.title: "Lying To American Public": Pete Hegseth Under Fire In Congress Over Iran War
articles.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced tough questions from lawmakers about the Iran war on Wednesday. Lawmakers criticized Hegseth's handling of the conflict. US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faces tough questions from lawmakers about the Iran war on Wednesday.

articles.title: Hundreds of Ultra-Orthodox Jews protest Israel’s military draft
articles.summary: Hundreds of Ultra-Orthodox Jews blocked a main road in Israel to protest the country's mandatory military service. The protest was part of ongoing opposition to the draft. Hundreds of Ultra-Orthodox Jews blocked a main road, as part of protests against Israel’s mandatory military service.

articles.title: Rs 23,69,81,75,00,000: What US Has Lost In Iran War So Far
articles.summary: The United States has lost over Rs 23,69,81,75,00,000 in the Iran war so far, according to estimates. The US started carrying out strikes against Iran on February 28. The United States started carrying out strikes against Iran on February 28.

articles.title: Paraguay Says It’s Not Abandoning Taiwan. China Has Other Plans.
articles.summary: Paraguay reaffirmed its diplomatic ties with Taiwan, resisting China's efforts to sway the South American nation. Beijing has been trying to isolate Taiwan, but Paraguay remains committed to its decades-long relationship.

articles.title: US charges Sinaloa governor and other Mexican officials with drug trafficking offences
articles.summary: The US charged the governor of Sinaloa and nine other Mexican officials with drug trafficking offences, accusing them of aiding the Sinaloa cartel's importation of narcotics into the US. The indictment includes charges of weapons offences and kidnapping.

articles.title: Trump urges Tehran to ‘give up’; Ghalibaf mocks US strategy
articles.summary: Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf mocked the US strategy of economic pressure, as oil prices surged and tensions continued in the Hormuz Strait. US President Trump had urged Tehran to "give up" on its nuclear program.

articles.title: Balendra Shah govt defers Parliament, opts for ordinances
articles.summary: Nepal's Balendra Shah government decided to defer Parliament sessions and instead issue ordinances. The move allows the government to push through legislation without legislative approval. Balendra Shah govt defers Parliament, opts for ordinances.

articles.title: U.S. Indictment Accuses Mexican Governor of Conspiring With Sinaloa Cartel
articles.summary: Rubén Rocha Moya, Sinaloa's governor, was accused of conspiring with the Sinaloa Cartel. Prosecutors accused Rubén Rocha Moya, the governor of Sinaloa state, and other Mexican officials of a yearslong conspiracy to protect the powerful cartel.

articles.title: Trump says U.S. may cut the number of American troops in Germany
articles.summary: US President Trump said the US may reduce its troop presence in Germany. The potential cut in American troops was announced during a CBS News interview. Trump says U. S. may cut the number of American troops in Germany CBS News.

articles.title: बिपाशा बसु ने पति करण सिंह ग्रोवर के साथ मनाई शादी की 10वीं सालगिरह, लिखा- 'मैं और देवी दुनिया की
articles.summary: बिपाशा बसु ने पति करण सिंह ग्रोवर के साथ शादी की 10वीं सालगिरह मनाई। उन्होंने सोशल मीडिया पर कई तस्वीरें शेयर कीं और बेटी देवी के लिए एक खूबसूरत नोट लिखा। बिपाशा ने अपनी शादी की सालगिरह को यादगार बनाया।

articles.title: गर्मियों में खीरा खाते हैं? ये 5 गलतियां बना सकती हैं आपको बीमार

articles.title: 'आप और ट्रंप लगातार झूठ बोल रहे हैं', अमेरिकी रक्षा मंत्री और सांसदों की तीखी बहस
articles.summary: अमेरिकी रक्षा मंत्री और सांसदों के बीच तीखी बहस हुई है। सांसद ने ट्रंप पर झूठ बोलने का आरोप लगाया है। एक सांसद ने जब ईरान युद्ध की वजह से दुनिया भर में तेल की कीमतों में बढ़ोतरी और महंगाई की बात कही तो पीट हेगसेथ ने कहा, 'आपको शर्म आनी चाहिए '.

articles.summary: ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच संघर्ष अभी सुलझा नहीं है, वहीं चीन ने दो युद्धपोत भेजे हैं। यह कदम दूसरे युद्ध की आहट के रूप में देखा जा रहा है। चीन के इस कदम से क्षेत्र में तनाव बढ़ सकता है।
